- @brief Mixin providing logging capabilities to including classes.
- @brief Log a message to stdout with the class name prefix.

```
26: module Loggable
29: def log(message)
30: puts "[#{self.class.name}] #{message}"
31: end
35: def log_error(error)
36: puts "[ERROR] #{error.message}"
37: puts error.backtrace.first(5).join("\n") if error.backtrace
38: end
39: end
```

```
47: class MyClass
48: include Loggable
49: include Comparable
52: attr_accessor :name

62: @options = options

66: end

73: end
78: def self.bulk_create(names)
79: names.map { |n| new(n) }
80: end

85: !@name.nil? && !@name.empty?
86: end
91: def matches?(pattern)
92: return false if @name.nil?
93: pattern.match?(@name)
94: end
99: def <=>(other)
100: @name <=> other.name
101: end
106: def +(other)
107: self.class.new("#{@name}+#{other.name}")
108: end
112: def to_s
113: "MyClass(#{@name})"
114: end
121: def method_missing(method, *args, &block)
122: if method.to_s.start_with?('find_by_')
123: field = method.to_s.sub('find_by_', '')
124: "Finding by #{field}: #{args.first}"
125: else
126: super
127: end
128: end

136: end
138: protected
142: def internal_config
143: @options.dup
144: end
146: private
150: def validate!
151: raise "Invalid name" unless valid?
152: end
153: end
```

### CLASS: `DynamicModel`
> Signature: `class DynamicModel`
> Lines: 225-238
- @brief Demonstrates metaprogramming with define_method.
- @brief Dynamically defined getter for #{field}.
```
225: class DynamicModel
227: %w[title body author].each do |field|
229: define_method(field) do
230: instance_variable_get("@#{field}")
231: end
234: define_method("#{field}=") do |value|
235: instance_variable_set("@#{field}", value)
236: end
237: end
238: end
```

### FUNCTION: `with_retry`
> Signature: `def with_retry(attempts: MAX_RETRIES)`
> Lines: 255-268
```
255: def with_retry(attempts: MAX_RETRIES)
256: tries = 0
257: begin
258: tries += 1
259: yield
260: rescue StandardError => e
262: retry if tries < attempts
263: raise "Failed after #{attempts} attempts: #{e.message}"
264: ensure
266: puts "Completed after #{tries} attempt(s)"
267: end
268: end
```
